title: Just Drop It!
description: reworks the vanilla item drop physics, so they become more natural and visually better. enhancing your gameplay!
body:
![an image showcasing dropped flat items and block rotation items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4d3af1f1629da25094ebcdad4187729fb90a49d_0.webp) A simple Fabric Minecraft Mod for 1.21.1 that adds physics to dropped items! ## Physics Implemented: - Flat on the ground - Flat items lay flat on the ground - 3D block support - Items slide before lying on the face they land on! - Ice support - Items will slide on different types of ice perfectly fine! - SlimeBlock Support - Items will bounce ontop of slimeblocks and will decrease their height in time - HoneyBlock - Items will be slightly encased in honeyblocks, but they're still able to be picked up! - Slab / Stairs support - Items will properly work with stairs and slabs - Sneak = Farther Throwing - Sneak to throw items a tad bit further! probably good if you want to make items clear gaps or ravines. ## Server & Client support notice: - Only client side is supported currently, but server & client support is being worked on! - This means the Physics mod won't work as expected, or will disable itself on servers. ___ Please note as well, this is only a simple mod. and It's not *entirely* a priority to keep updated to newest versions. ## Looking for something in priority development? If you enjoyed this little fun visual tweak, you may be interested in my current project: [![GrimVeil Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6c829167ae2364e66c02d94b717073af7ba19b9_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil) A dark exploration mod that adds **The Lost Woods**. A hostile, hand-crafted region filled with a new encounter, material, and structures. Designed to be uncovered through observation and exploration rather than guided progression. Actively developed and expanding.
Available exlusively on Modrinth: [**GrimVeil**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grimveil)
